entity: Oscar Robertson 1961-62 season (CIN, Regular): 79 GP, 30.8 PPG, 12.5 RPG, 11.4 APG — the only season in NBA history where a player averaged a triple-double until Russell Westbrook in 2016-17 (55 years later)

query_target.sql: SELECT season_year, season_type, CAST(gp AS INTEGER) AS gp, avg_pts, avg_reb, avg_ast FROM agg_player_season WHERE player_id = 600015 AND season_year = '1961-62' AND season_type = 'Regular' LIMIT 1

notes: Retired player; match:containsObject with exact values. agg_player_season.total_pts is unreliable for historical players (inflated by a factor of ~5x for Oscar), so the fixture pins avg_pts (which checks out at 30.8 PPG, matching BBR). CAST(gp AS INTEGER) forces a number; season_type is 'Regular' per the binding constraint.
